results.rendered_html:
saṭaṃ, saṭā
1 An ascetic's matted hair.
2 The mane (of a lion);  Mu. 7. 6 ;  Śi. 1. 47. 
3 Bristles of a boar; vidhyaṃtamuddhṛtasaṭāḥ pratihaṃtumīṣuḥ  R. 9. 60. 
4 A braid of hair.
5 A crest.
Comp.
— aṃkaḥ a lion.
